# Mikhail Shytsko

> Software & AI Engineer based in Bratislava, Slovakia. Solutions & AI Engineer at Slovenská sporiteľňa (Slovakia's largest retail bank, 2M+ customers) since July 2025. Founder of Seedfast — a schema-aware synthetic test-data generator for PostgreSQL for compliance-sensitive industries — since October 2025. 1st place at DDAccelerator Finals 2026 (Intelligent Digital Technology category, only Slovak startup among 9 countries).

## About

- [Portfolio](https://mikhail.shytsko.com): Single-page CV with summary, experience, projects, education, and contact links. Updated June 2026.
- [Resume PDF](https://mikhail.shytsko.com/cv.pdf): Downloadable resume.

## Projects

- [Seedfast](https://seedfa.st): Schema-aware synthetic test-data generator for PostgreSQL. Reads a database schema and produces referentially consistent, realistic data in under 3 minutes — built for regulated industries (finance, pharma, medtech) where production data cannot leave secure environments. Agentic code-execution generation core with a GEPA-based self-optimizing eval harness that raised generated-data quality from 28% to 73% on a multi-dimensional benchmark. Ships a developer-facing Go CLI and an MCP server. 1st place at DDAccelerator Finals 2026.
- [DDAccelerator article on Seedfast](https://www.ddaccelerator.com/news/seedfast-makes-database-seeding-fast-clean-and-reliable-straight-from-the-cli)

## Experience

- Slovenská sporiteľňa, Solutions & AI Engineer (Jul 2025 — present): MCP-based AI assistant for corporate lending — a least-privilege, fully auditable MCP tool layer over Azure OpenAI; change-detection across products, limits, collateral and client data; six-figure cost reduction via an in-house Kafka pipeline; 85% faster responses for two high-load services serving 2M+ customers.
- Seedfast, Founder (Oct 2025 — present): see Projects above.

## Expertise

- AI / LLM engineering: agentic LLM applications, MCP-based agents and tooling, LLM evaluation (GEPA, LLM-as-judge), LangGraph
- Backend architecture: Spring Framework (Kotlin/Java), Python, Go, Apache Kafka, high-load microservices
- Databases: PostgreSQL, schema-aware synthetic data generation
- Domain: banking and regulated-industry software

## Languages

- English, Slovak, Russian, Belarusian
